segments.text: We have assembled here to worship Sadashiva which is reflected within us as Shri Mataji,
As the Spirit.
He's reflected in our heart and you've seen that
The goal of out life was achieve this state of spirit

How people were tortured. First of all
They're asked you
Some or others
Deny default

tried to sleep

Give up your life give up your children

then we will get the marijuana as it is good at marijuana

To begin with

before that we are even worthy of discussion on Nirvana

why my attention go'stto fruit

then,you know on your vibrations also
there is something wrong with You

But in the older times, all these things were done individually like a one person who starts
The path of Nirvana. He used to go into Ekad means lonely places
Stay away from people, avoid them have nothing to do and achieve this ascent self realization only for himself.
It was not for others then the gentleman became absolutely exclusive he wouldn't talk anyone
He would meet anybody
And you could sit somewhere on top of a remote mountain
Anybody who tried to meet him, he would throw stones or say all kinds of horrible things
and never be that person. But Sahaja Yoga is not the same
Sahaj yoga with ascent upto whole this kind singular achievements did
not lead people anywhere. Saints off course try
To talk about self-realisation
About God, about righteousness
about value system, but they too were regarded as something strange and we are tortured
in trouble.
So on the level of an individual assent ,they couldn't do anything for others except
talking it or telling to you till Sahaja Yoga came . Even that talk was put into
Till the twelfth century what we talked about, it was all in Sanskrit very difficult Sanskrit books
which were only available to few aspirants. Was explained into many-many few even
too a number of people but giving realization is that one master had
one disciple and all was the individual asset, individual work.
Such a disciple who has taken away from others
I was kept in secret worked it out on him
And just may say he may write poems
He will talk about you to might save what is joys but
we had no right to give realization

So now see how far you have gone
You've got your realization
without giving up much. You can work on a much wider scale, you
give realizations to them .You know about all the subtle knowledge
of Sahaja Yoga but today I am going tell something more which is very
important because as was described by people that they practice
Yoga as they go to church but it's not from their heart and heart is the God of the Spirit.
So we have know more about Heart, you now these three Nadis that we are, Nira, Binda

it goes to hell. That's why they say that Shivaya is a destroyer
Actually you ask for your destruction and when you asked for your destruction,
You have it! Even if it destroys everything as I was telling
It's like even the fruit has to come, the petals
look at with their destroyed. As I am destroying
I would say many of your things, you can call it like your conditionings or ego
Your racialism and your fanaticism. All these have been destroyed in Sahaja Yoga
This has to be destroyed for the beauty come out
So when your marialas cross beyond certain point
In four directions there are destructions made as they're our four matters
So now what is to be done? How are we going stop this destruction through the first journey going to hell.
One of qualities Shiva has that he's innocent, extremely innocent, his innocence personified
So we have to, our karmic desires, dissolve them, dissolve then into the innocence.
The ocean of innocence you've got to dissolve it in that ocean is something
To be appreciated ,to understood and enjoyed
Like if see animals they are innocent
You'll see children their innocent
Flowers there're innocent
Divert your attention to all these things, you see on walking in the street.

You can at 3' height of flowers, beautiful grass
All children who are about 3' have the best
We need not people that are above that
Just seen from 3' level
You can see the legs of somebody, that's all right but you don't see the eyes
Of a person who are not innocent. So dissolve this desire into innocence
And these Mooladhara which is innocent it' snot dead finished
But its innocent ,it i righteous . It is Shri Ganesha quality
Its pure so even if your in world
Even if you are living like a human being, even if have children still your innocent.

Rishi

You go tell these people

The River again went down

,to be
married

absolutely innocent about

Nadi

all kinds of possessions

it's just to have more

for example

all my attention will be how we like it that sorry

in second place

Desire for beautiful things,
We can shift our material desires to aesthetics

he throws light in such manner
he works out his such manner
just wants to convince you about me

we'll leave it upto You

how much love we must haved

The next track is from
Shivananda Lahari
by Adi Shankaracharya
I beg prostration
to Shiva and Parvati
who formed the embodiment of all hearts, fine and practical.
Whose method Christ are adorned with the crescent moon
who had to each other
mutual rewards obtained by their respective austerities
who bestow on aspirants liberation
another fruits or devotional life
Who have the source of abounding good
through three worlds
who reveal themselves in forms of ever-renewing novelty with the progress
or meditation and whose experience generates supreme bliss
In a mind contemplating on them.
I contemplate,
my heart
On The Supreme Deity
Shiva
Three-eyed and luminous being
Who is to be known through the Vedas
who shines in the heart of creatures,
Who destroys three bodies, gross, subtle and causal.
Of His worshippers
is he first among all beings
majestic with his spine of matted locks
wears a garland of quivering serpents
sports a deer in hand
merciful towards me
Lord of all creatures
support pure consciousness
who is inseparable from the Divine Mother and who has disguised himself in a worldly garb.
O great God, thou Lord of Creatures! Just as there is misapprehension
Of silver in mother of pearl
Or charming imitation stone
or milking water mixed with flour
Of water and mirage, so do ignorant men mistakenly worship various beings as deities without thinking of thee in their mind.
O Lord! Thou that bearest a scurling end, thou mendicant, thou auspicious and all-pervading one,
Accepting this monkey of my mind as My Devout Offering,
bind it with the cord of devotion and bring
It under Thy control.
This extremely wayward Monkey that always wanders in
The Forests Of Ignorance.
Dancing on their hilltop from young woman's breast
And moving about quickly
In diverse directions according to His promptings
along the branches of working desires.
O thou resident on a mountain,
when shall see thee and gain bliss untenable even by Brahma
or others holding with my hand thy holy feet
blessing them against me head chest
and eyes, embracing them as many of their fragrance resembling that
over a full-brown lotus.
Thou Master Of The Worlds!
When with the water wheel or intellect
at the bottom worlds
the pure waters on divine stories
of Sadashiva are brought to field
through the canals
and sub-channels of poise, the rice crop
or devotion yields a plentiful harvest.
Where is then fear of family?
For me who am thy dependent
fondly residing in fortress Durga
take thine residence always
into well supplied fortress for my mind
having calmness as the boat
unyielding resolution as the surrounding walls,
the rising multitude of virtues
has a fateful harmony.
The powerful senses located in
their body are the gates
and knowledge is abounding wealth
for thou merciful cow
protect that holy cow of mine
the cow devotion to thee
which yields continually
as milk an endless supply
of the nectar of joy, which lives in the carpen
or thy holy feet and which I have acquired
as a result on my meritorious deeds.
The best among intelligent men,
the bow their mental disposition
with the bowstring of filth devotion
having destroyed an enemy of sins
without failing arrows of divine contemplation
become notorious
and attain to the undecaying sovereignty of liberation.
O great Lord, thou who are united with Huma
The Divine Mother
Who ever attains through a state
in which the joyful sorranness is hard
To be
And spends his time partly worshiping thee
Partly meditation
An ecstasy
Partly in prostrating
Partly in listening to Thy stories, partly in seeing Thy holy image and partly in singing
Thy praise.
He has attained liberation this very life indeed!
O Thou source of bliss, also is thy food, serpent thy garment, elephant hide thy garment
And a big oxy thy vehicle What when wouldst thou give me?
What hast thou gone to give?
Therefore grant unto me only devotion
To thy lotus feet, O moon-crested one.
By thine grace the primordial innocence, avidia
Lodged in my heart has disappeared
And the cherished divine knowledge hath dawn'd
Always in ecstatic thought I worship thy lotus feet
Which are capable of conferring what is good
and which constitute the chalice of salvation.
